questionHtml:
The table shows some codons for five amino acids.

Which of these DNA strands will code for the amino acid sequence glycine-serine-glycine?

A.  CCUUCGCCG

B.  CCTTCGCCG

C.  GGAAGCGGA

D.  CCUUCGCCU
